title: Edit Fields module outputs null values
symptom: The Edit Fields module returns null for all output fields when trying to process data from a form submit.
applies_when: Data is submitted from a form
not_this_if: Data is correctly processed from a webhook
root_cause: The Edit Fields module is case-sensitive regarding field names. If the field names in the Edit Fields module do not match the case of the submitted data, it will result in null outputs.
fix_steps: Check the field names in the Edit Fields module for case sensitivity.
Ensure that the field names match exactly with those submitted from the form.
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the field names in the Edit Fields module to match the submitted data's case.
